title: Bill for Risk Diversification Across Republic Portfolios

reasoning.problem: I intend to propose a bill to enforce risk diversification requirements across Republic portfolios. This bill will mandate that no single asset can constitute more than 10% of the total portfolio value, preventing catastrophic losses due to the failure of a single entity like Dynasty. The bill will also establish a risk assessment framework to identify and mitigate potential concentration risks proactively. This addresses the immediate existential threat of the Dynasty concentration, mitigating future systemic risks and ensuring LEF's continued survival.

technical_spec.description: To be defined by the House of Builders.
